home.title: Privacy-Friendly Tools Without Login
home.description: Discover curated privacy-friendly tools that work without login or signup. Browse verified tools across design, development, productivity, and more.
home.jsonLd.orgDescription: A curated directory of privacy-friendly tools that work without login.
about.title: About
about.description: About nologin.tools — a curated directory of tools that work without login.
about.heading: About nologin.tools
about.intro: We believe the best tools are the ones that let you start working immediately, respecting both your time and your privacy.
about.missionP1: The internet has become increasingly fragmented by "walled gardens" and unnecessary friction. Simple tasks now often require a multi-step registration process, email verification, and the surrender of personal data.
about.missionP2: nologin.tools is a curated directory of high-quality software and services that let you get things done without creating an account.
about.verification2: We confirm core tasks work without login.
about.verification3: Health checks monitor tool uptime daily.
about.verification4: The community helps keep data accurate.
about.badgeDesc: Tool creators can display our badge to signal their commitment to a frictionless user experience.
about.outroP1: nologin.tools is built on transparent principles by
about.outroP2: Our code is open source, and our database is exported regularly to help others build privacy-first applications.
notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.detail: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
submit.title: Submit a Tool
submit.description: Submit a tool that works without login to the nologin.tools directory.
submit.heading: Submit a Tool
submit.intro: Help the community by sharing tools that respect user privacy and work without a login.
submit.repoUrlHint: Filling this will automatically mark the tool as open source.
submit.pledge: I confirm this tool's core functionality works without creating an account or logging in.
submit.coreTaskLabel: What can you do without login?
submit.submitDisclaimer: By submitting, you agree that the information provided is accurate and adheres to our quality standards.
submit.errCorrect: Please correct the errors highlighted above before submitting.
submit.errName: Please enter a valid tool name (min 2 chars).
submit.errUrlInvalid: Please enter a complete URL (e.g., https://...).
submit.errDescription: A description is required so users know what the tool does.
submit.errPledge: You must confirm the no-login pledge to submit.
submit.errCoreTask: Please explain what users can do without logging in.
submit.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
submit.errRepoUrl: Please enter a GitHub repository URL.
submit.errDuplicate: This tool has already been submitted.
submit.errGeneral: Submission failed. Please check your inputs.
submit.errNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
submit.errUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
submitSuccess.title: Tool Submitted
submitSuccess.description: Your tool has been submitted for review.
submitSuccess.heading: Submission Received!
submitSuccess.intro: Thank you for contributing to the community. Our team will review your submission shortly.
submitSuccess.pendingNote: Note: The tool will only appear in the public directory and search results after it has been approved.
submitSuccess.badgeDesc: While you wait for approval, you can prepare the verification badge for your website. Tools that display the badge receive higher visibility.
tool.defaultDescription: {name} — a tool that works without login.
tool.pendingDesc: This tool is currently being reviewed. It will appear in the public directory once approved.
tool.viewBadgeEmbed: View badge page & get embed code
tool.editSubmitted: Edit suggestion submitted! It will be reviewed.
tool.editSelectTag: Please select at least one tag.
tool.editNameLength: Name must be between 2 and 100 characters.
tool.editCoreTaskLength: Core task must be max 200 characters.
badge.title: NoLogin Verified Badge
badge.description: What is NoLogin Verified? Learn about the badge that certifies tools work without login.
badge.heroDesc: We're on a mission to celebrate tools that let you work instantly — without the friction of accounts, passwords, or data harvesting.
badge.whatIsP1: It is a digital trust certificate issued by
badge.whatIsP1Suffix: to web applications that have been manually audited by our team.
badge.whatIsP2: When a tool displays this badge, it serves as a guarantee that the **core functionality** promised by the tool is accessible to any user immediately, without the requirement to sign up, log in, or provide personal credentials.
badge.noAccountsDesc: Skip the "Sign Up" button. Just open the URL and start creating immediately.
badge.privacyFirstDesc: Your data stays with you. No email lists, no tracking, no unwanted marketing.
badge.instantValueDesc: Zero friction means you get your task done 10x faster than traditional tools.
badge.sealDesc: When you see the NoLogin Verified badge, you can trust that:
badge.manualReviewDesc: Every tool is individually tested by our verification team.
badge.coreTaskVerifiedDesc: We confirm the main utility is accessible without sign-up.
badge.healthMonitoringDesc: We track tool availability daily to ensure they stay accessible.
badge.digitalPreservationDesc: Verified tools are archived to ensure long-term transparency.
badge.joinDesc: Building a privacy-first tool? Get recognized for your commitment to a registration-free experience.
badge.rankingBoostDesc: Tools that display our badge on their site receive a ranking boost in the nologin.tools directory.
badgeDetail.whatIsDesc: This certificate, issued by {issuer}, confirms that {name} has been manually audited. It guarantees that users can access its core features immediately—without ever needing to sign up or log in.
badgeDetail.trustManualReviewDesc: Individually tested by humans to ensure a login-free experience.
badgeDetail.trustPrivacyDesc: Core tasks are accessible without harvesting personal data.
badgeDetail.trustMonitoringDesc: Automated checks ensure the tool stays active and accessible.
badgeDetail.trustArchiveDesc: Public snapshots preserved on the Internet Archive for audit.
badgeDetail.attribution: This certificate is issued and maintained by
badgeDetail.addToSiteDesc: Display the NoLogin Verified badge to signal your commitment to a frictionless user experience. Tools with active badges receive a ranking boost.
badgeDetail.pendingEmbedNote: Verification in progress. You can embed the code now; it will automatically update to "Verified" once approved.
